company.name: BeOne Medicines
company.subtitle: Brukinsa $3.9B global BTK leader | Tevimbra $737M | 2026 guide $6.2-6.4B

market.notes: Brukinsa 2025: $3.9B (+49%), US $2.8B. Global BTKi leader. 75+ markets. 87% GM.

us.patientsK.note: SEER 2024: ~21K new CLL + ~80K new NHL/yr; ~180K prevalent on active tx. Source: NCI SEER, LLS.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 prevalence ~200K CLL/NHL on tx; HMRN + EUROCARE registries.

row.patientsK.note: Global ex-US/EU ~250K; China NMPA CLL registry + APAC hematology estimates.

us.wtpPct.note: ~60% -- Medicare + commercial coverage for BTKi/CAR-T strong; CAR-T access gated by accredited centers.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~45% -- HTA (NICE, G-BA) approved BTKi/bispecifics; CAR-T reimbursement varies by country.

row.wtpPct.note: ~12% -- Japan + AU well-covered; EM rely on rituximab biosimilars + CHOP chemo.

us.priceK.note: Blended $220K: BTKi $200K (45% pts) + CAR-T $410K (5%) + bispecific $250K (10%) + anti-CD20 $80K (25%) + chemo $30K (15%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$130K blended; EU net ~60% of US list across modalities.

row.priceK.note: ~$50K blended; generics (rituximab biosim, CHOP) dominant outside Japan.

penPct.note: ~47% peak -- BTKi + CAR-T + bispecifics combined capture of eligible CLL/NHL over 5yr.

us.reachPct.note: Brukinsa BTKi CLL+MCL+WM; ~22% CLL/NHL share, growing vs Imbruvica decline

us.wtpPct.note: US drug-specific WTP 65% -- established payor adoption + formulary coverage

eu.reachPct.note: EU reach 15% of 200K patients; lower than US due to HTA gating + biosimilar pressure

eu.priceK.note: EU net $125K/yr post-HTA (~50-60% of US list typical)

row.reachPct.note: ROW reach 4% of 250K -- Japan + select markets; limited ex-Japan access

row.wtpPct.note: ROW drug-specific WTP 12% -- Japan PMDA reimbursed; emerging markets patchy

row.priceK.note: ROW blended $50K/yr -- Japan near EU, emerging markets lower via tiered pricing

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~27K gastric + ~22K esophageal/yr US; ~25K on systemic. Source: NCI SEER 2024.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~800K on-tx; China + Japan + Korea >60% global gastric burden (GLOBOCAN 2022).

us.wtpPct.note: ~58% -- Keytruda+chemo 1L (KEYNOTE-859), Enhertu HER2+ 2L, Vyloy CLDN18.2 covered; NCCN Cat 1.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~44% -- NICE approved pembro+chemo + Enhertu + zolbetuximab; G-BA betraechtlich for HER2+.

row.wtpPct.note: ~20% -- Japan PMDA + China NRDL cover IO+chemo; high volume market.

us.priceK.note: Blended $135K: pembro+chemo $175K (40% pts) + Enhertu HER2+ $185K (15%) + Vyloy CLDN18.2 $140K (20%) + chemo alone $25K (25%).

row.priceK.note: ~$32K blended; China/Japan mix with trastuzumab biosim + tislelizumab NRDL price.

penPct.note: ~48% peak -- IO+chemo 1L saturated; CLDN18.2 (Vyloy) ~38% + HER2+ 20% + FGFR2b (bemarituzumab) extend.

us.reachPct.note: Tevimbra late entrant in crowded PD-1 class (Keytruda/Opdivo dominant); ~8% reach in niche solid tumor indications where tislelizumab has data

us.priceK.note: PD-1 class pricing ~$180K/yr US WAC; Tevimbra priced competitively with existing IO agents

us.wtpPct.note: US drug-specific WTP 60% -- established payor adoption + formulary coverage

eu.reachPct.note: EU reach 8% of 35K patients; lower than US due to HTA gating + biosimilar pressure

eu.priceK.note: EU net $100K/yr post-HTA (~50-60% of US list typical)

row.reachPct.note: ROW reach 8% of 800K -- Japan + select markets; limited ex-Japan access

row.wtpPct.note: ROW drug-specific WTP 15% -- Japan PMDA reimbursed; emerging markets patchy

row.priceK.note: ROW blended $40K/yr -- Japan near EU, emerging markets lower via tiered pricing

market.notes: Potentially best-in-class BCL2. Brukinsa+sonro fixed-duration CLL. $3-5B peak.

us.patientsK.note: ~80K US CLL + FL prevalent on BCL2-directed tx (Venclexta label). Source: AbbVie 10-K, CLL Society.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~90K BCL2-eligible CLL/FL; NICE CLL guidance + CLL14 regimen.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~110K; Japan CLL ~7K + China ~40K CLL+FL on ven-based regimens.

us.wtpPct.note: ~65% -- Venclexta+obinutuzumab 1L CLL NCCN Cat 1; Medicare Part B+D; ramp-up TLS monitoring in outpatient.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~48% -- NICE TA approved ven+obi CLL 2019; G-BA betraechtlich; HTA favors fixed-duration vs continuous BTKi.

row.wtpPct.note: ~14% -- Japan PMDA full; China NRDL 2020; EM chlorambucil+rituximab biosim.

us.priceK.note: Blended $165K: ven+obi fixed 12mo $180K (70% pts) + ven+R 2L $150K (20%) + ven mono $120K (10%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$95K blended; fixed-duration reduces EU cost vs continuous BTKi.

row.priceK.note: ~$35K blended; obi biosim + ven priced lower in China/EM.

penPct.note: ~40% peak -- BCL2-dependent subset (CLL + FL); next-gen BCL2 (sonrotoclax) + BCL2+BTKi doublets extend.

us.reachPct.note: Ph3 BCL2 -- strong combo data with Brukinsa positions for 12% reach in CLL/NHL BCL2-eligible patients

us.priceK.note: BCL2 class pricing anchored by venetoclax ~$180K/yr; sonrotoclax priced at parity

us.wtpPct.note: US drug-specific WTP 45% -- estimated launch WTP pending Phase 3 + label

eu.reachPct.note: EU reach 8% of 90K; EMA pathway at phase3

eu.wtpPct.note: EU drug-specific WTP 35% -- EMA path pending Phase 3; HTA gating expected

eu.priceK.note: EU net $110K/yr post-HTA (~50-60% of US list typical)

row.reachPct.note: ROW reach 3% of 110K; ex-US/EU access lags by years at phase3

row.wtpPct.note: ROW drug-specific WTP 10% -- ROW access limited to Japan + select APAC at launch

row.priceK.note: ROW blended $45K/yr -- Japan near EU, emerging markets lower via tiered pricing

us.patientsK.note: ~15K US post-covalent-BTKi failure (C481S mut + intolerance); ~12K eligible for Jaypirca/pirto. Source: Lilly 10-K, MDACC.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~25K on 2nd-gen non-covalent BTKi or CAR-T salvage.

us.wtpPct.note: ~60% -- Jaypirca (pirtobrutinib) post-BTKi accel approval 2023; Medicare + commercial NCCN Cat 2A R/R CLL.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~42% -- EMA approved pirto 2023; NICE TA in progress; reimbursement via CDF.

row.wtpPct.note: ~10% -- Japan PMDA review pending; limited access elsewhere.

us.priceK.note: Blended $215K: pirto $225K (60% pts) + CAR-T salvage $420K (10%) + bispecific (epco/mosu) $260K (20%) + allo-SCT $150K (10%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$125K blended; EU net ~58% US for non-covalent BTKi.

penPct.note: ~35% peak -- ncBTKi + BCL2 retreatment + CAR-T stack; BTK degraders (BGB-16673, NX-5948) next wave.

us.reachPct.note: BTK-resistant niche is small (15K US pts) but high unmet need; 15% reach = patients who failed prior BTKi

us.priceK.note: Next-gen BTK degrader priced at premium to BTKi class (~$200K/yr) for resistance setting

us.wtpPct.note: US drug-specific WTP 40% -- estimated launch WTP pending Phase 3 + label

eu.reachPct.note: EU reach 10% of 18K; EMA pathway at phase3

eu.wtpPct.note: EU drug-specific WTP 32% -- EMA path pending Phase 3; HTA gating expected

eu.priceK.note: EU net $120K/yr post-HTA (~50-60% of US list typical)

row.reachPct.note: ROW reach 4% of 25K; ex-US/EU access lags by years at phase3

row.wtpPct.note: ROW drug-specific WTP 10% -- ROW access limited to Japan + select APAC at launch

row.priceK.note: ROW blended $50K/yr -- Japan near EU, emerging markets lower via tiered pricing

market.notes: HCC orphan. HER2 gastric. Amgen products $486M.

us.patientsK.note: NCI: ~42K new liver/yr US; ~20K advanced HCC on systemic. Source: NCI SEER 2024, AASLD.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~60K HCC/yr; ~25K on systemic per EASL registry.

us.wtpPct.note: ~60% -- atezo+bev (IMbrave150) + durva+treme (HIMALAYA) 1L SOC; NCCN Cat 1; Medicare broad.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~46% -- NICE approved atezo+bev 2022; G-BA betraechtlich; sorafenib/lenvatinib generic fallback.

row.wtpPct.note: ~22% -- Japan J-DPC + China NRDL cover IO+VEGF; high HCC volume drives TKI generic use.

us.priceK.note: Blended $135K: atezo+bev $180K (35% pts) + durva+treme $195K (15%) + lenva/sora $95K (30%) + nivo+ipi 2L $175K (20%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$78K blended; EU net ~58% US; lenvatinib/sorafenib generic <$20K.

penPct.note: ~45% peak -- IO-VEGF 1L penetrated 55% eligible; Child-Pugh A only limits; FGF19 + GPC3 ADCs emerging.

us.reachPct.note: Mixed early pipeline (HCC orphan, gastric, other) -- 5% reach reflects Ph1-3 mix across multiple tumors

us.priceK.note: Oncology specialty pricing ~$180K/yr across IO/targeted combos

us.wtpPct.note: US drug-specific WTP 35% -- speculative -- Phase 1 proof-of-concept only

eu.reachPct.note: EU reach 3% of 25K; EMA pathway at phase1

eu.wtpPct.note: EU drug-specific WTP 28% -- EU access TBD; EMA pathway unclear at stage

eu.priceK.note: EU net $100K/yr post-HTA (~50-60% of US list typical)

row.reachPct.note: ROW reach 2% of 650K; ex-US/EU access lags by years at phase1

row.wtpPct.note: ROW drug-specific WTP 8% -- ROW access limited to Japan + select APAC at launch

row.priceK.note: ROW blended $35K/yr -- Japan near EU, emerging markets lower via tiered pricing

catalysts.title: BGB-16673 vs pirtobrutinib Phase 3 head-to-head trial start
catalysts._rationale: Head-to-head Phase 3 trial versus pirtobrutinib began enrolling in Q4 2025

catalysts.title: BGB-11417-304 first-line CLL trial start
catalysts._rationale: New phase 3 trial in first-line CLL expected to begin January 2026

catalysts.title: Sonrotoclax MCL NDA decision
catalysts._rationale: FDA granted priority review for sonrotoclax MCL NDA with 6-month review timeline
